mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (course_id, knowledge_point, type, content, options, answer, score, create_time) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{type}, #{content}, #{options}, #{answer}, #{score}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET course_id = #{courseId}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint}, type = #{type}, content = #{content}, options = #{options}, answer = #{answer}, score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM question WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE knowledge_point LIKE CONCAT('%', #{knowledgePoint}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE 1=1 AND course_id = #{courseId} AND knowledge_point LIKE CONCAT('%', #{knowledgePoint}, '%')

SELECT * FROM question WHERE id IN
#{id}
